title: Petrol, diesel prices to decrease from Wednesday
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - Motorists can...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - Motorists can look forward to having a little more cash in their wallets as fuel will cost even less at the pumps from midnight.

October’s official fuel prices have been confirmed and, for the fifth month in a row, petrol and diesel prices will decrease.

Petrol 93 sees a decrease of R1.06 per litre, while petrol 95 comes down by R1.14 per litre.

Diesel 0.05% takes a R1.14 per litre tumble, while 0.005% diesel falls by R1.12 per litre.


> October’s inland prices:


- Petrol 93: R20.73
- Petrol 95: R21.05
- Diesel 0.05%: R18.45
- Diesel 0.005%: R18.57
- Illuminating paraffin: R12.66.

October’s coastal prices:

- Petrol 93: R19.94
- Petrol 95: R20.26
- Diesel 0.05%: R17.66
- Diesel 0.005%: R17.81
- Illuminating paraffin: R11.66.

Read original story on www.citizen.co.za

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
